name: ASRock B850M PRO RS Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - M.2 Socket (Key E) - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B850M PRO RS Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: ASRock B850M PRO RS Micro-ATX motherboard with AM5 socket, PCIe 5.0, and dual video outputs for compact professional builds.
